_comment: Optional per-location notes corrections, keyed by GCFB id. The base `notes` value is rebuilt deterministically from the GCFB hours comments on every seed; an entry here replaces it, so any hand-curated note survives a full rebuild (unlike editing the DB directly, which a --reset wipes). Keys starting with "_" are ignored.

_example.223: Closed the week of major holidays; call ahead.
